name: Marketing Landing Page
description: Product marketing landing page with hero, problem/solution visualization, feature showcase, social proof, and conversion-focused CTAs. Single-page scroll layout for SaaS, developer tools, and tech products.

pages.description: Full-length scrolling landing page with all marketing sections

page_briefs.home: Full-length scrolling landing page. Split hero with headline and product screenshot. Before-after comparison section. Pipeline cards showing workflow steps. Tool list with descriptions. Quick-start code block. Tech pills showing integrations. Final CTA banner.
